title: Bulldog Drummond Strikes Back
writer: Nunnally Johnson, Henry Lehrman, Herman C. McNeile
actors: Ronald Colman, Loretta Young, Warner Oland
plot: Algy, Bulldog Drummond's right-hand-man, is getting married. Bulldog attends; on the way home, in the fog, he enters the (apparently deserted) mansion of Prince Achmed in search of a phone. He finds none, but he does find a body -...
